{{Quote|If you don't mind, I'm trying to keep a low profile. Now if you had something I was interested in, it might be a different story.|Kam, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SC" />}}
'''Kam''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] fence who operated out of the [[Science Outpost]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Kam was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SC" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Kam was added to the game along with the [[W:c:swg:Smuggler#Underworld Smuggler Missions|smuggling missions]] introduced with the [[W:c:swg:Chapter 3|"Chapter 3" update]], released on [[September 27]], [[2006]].<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter Archive 2006">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64186&resource=publish|text=Chapter Archive 2006}}</ref>
